Custom API keys and endpoint URLs will b: Custom API keys and endpoint URLs will be shared and may be overwritten
Default official URL, modify for custom: 默认官方 URL,可修改为自定义代理
Describe requirement details when no Wor: 未上传 Word 文档时，请填写需求细节描述
Describe what this app should do on each: 描述此应用在每次计划运行时应执行的操作。这是驱动 AI 的核心指令。
Describe what you want in plain language: Describe what you want in plain language; DevX will understand and act.
Describe your needs and DevX will genera: Describe your needs and DevX will generate complete code across languages and frameworks.
DevX - AI that gets things done: DevX - AI that gets things done
DevX - An open-source AI assistant with: DevX - An open-source AI assistant with browser automation. Create AI digital humans to automate tasks.
DevX is not just chat, it can help you d: DevX is not just chat, it can help you do things
DevX understands your goals, plans tasks: DevX understands your goals, plans tasks, and can execute autonomously—not just answer questions.
DevX's isolated config directory. Won't: DevX's isolated config directory. Won't interfere with your standalone Claude CLI.
Do not use tools that modify the codebas: 在我明确表示同意之前（例如回复确认或 OK），请勿使用会改动代码库的工具（不要写入或打补丁）。

Sessions appear automatically when users: 用户向机器人发送消息时会自动创建会话
Share Claude CLI's ~/.claude directory. Skills and settings are shared but changes in Claude CLI will affect DevX.
Show all workspace folders: 显示空间内全部文件夹
Show only task folders: 仅显示任务中的文件夹
Shows active tasks, pending actions, and: 展示所有空间中的进行中的任务、待处理操作和已固定对话。已完成或出错的任务会在查看1分钟后自动隐藏。
Skill name is required. Add a \"name:\": 技能名称为必填项。请在 frontmatter 中添加 "name:" 字段。
Skills installed in DevX will appear in: Skills installed in DevX will appear in Claude CLI
Source control requires the desktop app: Source control requires the desktop app
Star on GitHub: 在 GitHub 上点亮星标
Start a new conversation to create histo: 开始新对话以创建历史记录
Sub-task text (title and body, Markdown): 子任务正文（标题与说明，支持 Markdown）
Support OpenAI/compatible models via loc: 通过本地协议转换支持 OpenAI/兼容模型
Sure, I'll create a polished HTML presen: Sure, I'll create a polished HTML presentation that introduces DevX's core features and how to use it. The slides use a modern, minimal design, support left/right arrow navigation, and fit 1920x1080.
Switch to H5 mobile mode: 切换到 H5 移动模式
Both dropdowns keep your choices. The ta: 两个下拉会分别记住你的选择。任务实际绑定到你最近一次点选的具体空间；若一侧选「无」，在另一侧仍选中时会自动用另一侧作为绑定。
Tasks and pinned conversations appear he: 此处显示任务和已固定对话
Tasks implement product requirements in: 任务是对产品需求的编码实现。通常一个需求对应创建一个任务，可能涉及同时改动空间内的多个项目。
The AI shares the same conversation memo: 该AI在用户聊天和主动推送中共享相同的对话记忆。
The MCP server failed to connect. Toggle: MCP服务器连接失败。请切换“启用”开关以重试。
The response was interrupted unexpectedl: 响应意外中断。您可以继续对话。
The task is removed from the task list o: 仅从任务列表中移除此任务，关联会话与聊天记录仍保留在该空间中。
This action requires your confirmation t: 此操作需要您确认后才能继续
This app may require AI Browser to work: 此应用可能需要 AI 浏览器才能正常工作
This app uses a dedicated model, indepen: 此应用使用专用模型，独立于全局选择
This automation requires you to be logge: This automation requires you to be logged in to the above websites in the DevX browser.
This name is reserved by the system. Ple: 此名称被系统保留，请选择其他名称。
This removes the block from the saved pl: 将从已保存计划中删除该块内容。可再次执行「拆解任务」重新生成列表。
This task has no requirement document or: 该任务缺少需求文档/需求描述，请先补充后再进入会话。
This will permanently delete all memory: 这将永久删除所有记忆文件（memory.md 和运行历史）。应用将在下次运行时重新开始。
This will permanently delete the app and: 这将永久删除此应用及其所有数据。此操作无法撤销。
To enable AI to execute system commands: 为了让 AI 能够执行系统命令(如 git、npm、pip 等),需要安装命令执行环境。这是一次性操作,安装后无需重新配置。
Tool list is available after the MCP ser: 工具列表将在 MCP 服务器连接后显示。
Treated as a one-file skill; auto-named: 视为单文件技能；自动命名为 SKILL.md
Try adjusting your search or filters: 请尝试调整搜索词或筛选条件
Type a message, let DevX help you...
Unsupported file type. Drop a .md file,: 不支持的文件类型。请拖放 .md 文件、.zip 压缩包或技能文件夹。
Unsupported protocol. Use http://, https: 不支持的协议。请使用 http://、https://、socks4:// 或 socks5://
Use ← → to move between slides: 使用 ← → 键在幻灯片间切换
Use a custom directory path for Claude C: 为 Claude CLI 配置使用自定义目录路径。
Use local whisper.cpp for dictation with: 使用本机 whisper.cpp 进行离线听写，无需联网。请安装 whisper-cli（或 main），下载 GGML 模型（如 ggml-base.bin），并在下方填写路径。若设置了环境变量 WHISPER_CPP_BIN 与 WHISPER_CPP_MODEL，将优先使用它们。
Use natural language to have it write do: 使用自然语言让它编写文档、创建电子表格、搜索网页、编写代码……
Use one Markdown \"## \" heading per imp: 请为每个实施子任务使用 Markdown 的「## 」标题，以便界面为每一项显示操作按钮。
Use structured Markdown sections so engi: 请使用结构化 Markdown 分节，便于研发直接执行。
